metadata.title: Become a Partner | AdonERP
metadata.description: Join the Adon ERP Partner Program. Collaborate with a network of trusted professionals, grow your business, and unlock new revenue streams. Choose from implementation, reseller, or consulting partnership models.

hero.title: Partner
hero.description: Collaborate with Adon ERP — join a network of trusted professionals who deliver world-class solutions, amplify their brands, and unlock new revenue streams together.

testimonial.quote: Joining AdonERP as a partner transformed our business. The recognition, resources, and community are unmatched — we've expanded our reach to more than 15 new clients in just one quarter.
testimonial.name: Sofia Rodriguez

benefitsSection.title: Build something worth
benefitsSection.subtitle: talking about
benefitsSection.description: By joining the Adon ERP Partner Program, you gain access to resources, recognition, and opportunities that help you stand out and thrive.

benefits.title: Reach new customers
benefits.description: Showcase your expertise and grow your business by connecting with clients searching for solutions on AdonERP's growing platform.

benefits.title: Earn industry recognition
benefits.description: Build a trusted reputation as an AdonERP certified partner — a mark that signals quality and reliability across markets and industries.

benefits.title: Fast-track your growth
benefits.description: Access exclusive tools, training, and co-marketing opportunities to shorten your sales cycle and accelerate business outcomes.

benefits.title: Go global with confidence
benefits.description: Tap into international leads and expand your reach with AdonERP's presence in more than 180 countries worldwide.

benefits.title: Formal certification path
benefits.description: Earn platinum, gold, or silver partner credentials with structured exams, supervised training, and official accreditation milestones.

benefits.title: Dedicated partner support
benefits.description: Your personal account manager ensures you always have priority access to resources, technical guidance, and sales enablement.

journeySection.title: Become a partner in four easy steps
journeySection.description: Our streamlined process ensures you can go from application to delivering value to clients as quickly as possible.

steps.title: Apply to join
steps.description: Fill out our partner application form with your company details, market focus, and professional references.

steps.title: Attend training
steps.description: Complete our onboarding curriculum — product fundamentals, best practices, and tools — at your own pace.

steps.title: Complete certification
steps.description: Pass the exam to earn your official partner certificate and unlock tier bonuses and partner-only resources.

steps.title: Start growing
steps.description: Connect with leads, co-market together, and start delivering AdonERP solutions to your clients.

partnerTypesSection.title: Choose the path
partnerTypesSection.subtitle: that fits you
partnerTypesSection.description: No matter your focus, there's a partnership tier designed to help you deliver value and grow your business with AdonERP.

types.title: Implementation
types.description: Deploy and customize AdonERP, guide clients through the full setup, and manage long-term upgrades and integrations.

types.title: Reseller
types.description: Sell AdonERP subscriptions and complementary services to your customer base, supported by full training and materials.

types.title: Consulting
types.description: Lead digital transformation projects, conduct business process engineering, and deliver AdonERP-accelerated consulting engagements.

testimonials.quote: Becoming an AdonERP partner more than doubled our consulting pipelines the first year. The partner team is world-class, and the certification gives real credibility.
testimonials.name: Carlos Mendez

testimonials.quote: The structured partner path and certification tracking made it simple to scale. Our team now serves clients across three countries from one unified hub.
testimonials.name: Aisha Karim

ctaSection.title: Ready to grow together?
ctaSection.description: Join the Adon ERP Partner Program and start unlocking new opportunities today. Your next chapter starts here.
ctaSection.footerText: Free to apply · No commitment required · Fast review process
